description: Read repo files and search code without mutation.
notes: Universal across all 5 modes; never mutates state.

description: Fetch web content and search the web without mutation.
notes: External-world read; never mutates remote state.

description: Write or edit markdown under docs/wip/planning/** only.
conditional_constraint: Methodology mode may write only to methodology-tracking files (LOGIC_CHANGE_LOG drafts; operator-scratchpad; decision-row drafts; principle log).
notes: Ask mode forbids all writes; Debug mode forbids planning writes (findings go to LOGIC_CHANGE_LOG via Methodology transition).

description: Write or edit canonical CSVs / SOPs / code / configs / migrations.
representative_tools: Write;StrReplace;EditNotebook (akos/** scripts/** tests/** config/** supabase/** docs/references/**)
notes: Agent-mode-only; canonical-CSV gate (process_list / baseline_organisation / DECISION_REGISTER / etc.) requires explicit operator approval per akos-governance-remediation.mdc.

description: Write methodology-tracking artifacts (LOGIC_CHANGE_LOG / DECISION_REGISTER drafts / scratchpad / principle log).
conditional_constraint: Debug mode may append findings to LOGIC_CHANGE_LOG row drafts only (no other methodology surfaces) — surfaces a Methodology-mode transition when full methodology authoring is needed.
notes: Methodology mode's primary surface; persistent-across-sessions per MADEIRA_MODE_PARITY.md §3.2.
Agent-mode-only; reversible via git checkout; canonical-CSV deletes additionally require operator gate.

description: Execute read-only shell commands (no mutation of repo or world).
representative_tools: Shell (with git log/diff/status/blame; py scripts/validate_*.py; pytest; ls/cat-equivalent)
notes: Debug-mode usage limited to investigation; no fixes (those require Agent-mode transition).

description: Execute arbitrary shell commands including mutation (git commit/push/install/build/deploy).
representative_tools: Shell (with git commit;git push;npm install;py scripts/* mutating;deploy commands)

description: Spawn background or foreground subagents via Task tool.
notes: Agent-mode-only; subagents inherit per-mode RBAC of their spawned mode (default Agent).

description: Surface structured AskQuestion ratify gates to the operator.
notes: Plan mode uses for plan-ratify gates; Agent mode for inline-ratify per akos-inline-ratification.mdc; Methodology mode for methodology-candidate ratify; Ask mode is read-only research (no ratify needed); Debug mode escalates by transition not by AskQuestion.
Agent-mode-only; user-explicit-request-only per GenerateImage tool description.

description: Query observability MCPs (Sentry / Cloudflare Observability / Render monitoring / browser snapshot).
notes: Read-only observability is universal across all 5 modes; never mutates remote state.

description: Mutate data via MCP (Supabase apply_migration / execute_sql mutating / data write).
representative_tools: CallMcpTool against plugin-supabase-supabase apply_migration / mutating execute_sql; user-supabase same
notes: Agent-mode-only; data-plane gate per akos-holistika-operations.mdc operator SQL gate; mutating DML requires staging + migration file + operator gate.

description: Mutate external world via MCP (Slack send / Resend email / Stripe write / Figma write).
conditional_constraint: Agent-mode external-world mutation requires (a) operator-ratified send list and (b) BBR external-register check per akos-brand-baseline-reality.mdc and (c) render-trail per akos-external-render-discipline.mdc when audience is external.
representative_tools: CallMcpTool against plugin-slack-slack post-message tools;plugin-resend-resend send-email tools;user-stripe write tools;plugin-figma-figma use_figma write paths
notes: Agent-mode-only AND conditional; never silent — operator ratification required for external-world side effects.

description: Read external world via MCP (Figma read / Stripe read / docs MCPs / GitHub read).
notes: Read-only external-world MCPs are universal across all 5 modes.

description: Run BBR dual-register check before emission (akos-brand-baseline-reality.mdc).
conditional_constraint: Plan and Agent modes must invoke when authoring external-audience prose (any audience tag in J-IN / J-CU / J-PT / J-AD / J-ENISA / J-RC / J-CO); skip when audience is J-OP only.
notes: Methodology mode invokes mandatorily on every emission per MADEIRA_METHODOLOGY_MODE.md §2.3.
